title: Fail Closed Synthetic ECG Augmentation for External Clinical AI Validation
description: Lean reproducibility package for a retrospective external validation study evaluating fail-closed certification of synthetic 12-lead ECG augmentation under label scarcity and external distribution shift. The archive contains locked result tables, figure-generation scripts, build metadata, and documentation. It excludes generated figure files, manuscript submission files, and source ECG waveforms.
notes: This archive is for reproducibility of retrospective offline analyses and is not a clinical diagnostic tool. Source ECG waveforms are not included and must be obtained from the original dataset providers.
